glosses.vi: tạp chí; tạp chí học thuật

sentences.target: Ich kaufe eine Zeitschrift am Kiosk.

translations.de: Ich kaufe eine Zeitschrift am Kiosk.
translations.en: I'm buying a magazine at the kiosk.
translations.es: Estoy comprando una revista en el quiosco.
translations.it: Sto comprando una rivista al chiosco.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在报刊亭买一本杂志。
translations.yue: 我喺報紙檔買一本雜誌。
translations.pt: Estou comprando uma revista na banca.
translations.vi: Tôi đang mua một tạp chí ở quầy báo.
translations.nl: Ik koop een tijdschrift bij de kiosk.
translations.hi: मैं कियोस्क से एक मैगज़ीन खरीद रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Αγοράζω ένα περιοδικό από το περίπτερο.
translations.nb: Jeg kjøper et blad i kiosken.
translations.sv: Jag köper en tidskrift i kiosken.
translations.ro: Cumpăr o revistă de la chioșc.
translations.da: Jeg køber et blad i kiosken.
translations.ja: 売店で雑誌を買っている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive and selects an accusative object ('eine Zeitschrift').
Indefinite article (determiner), feminine accusative singular; modifies 'Zeitschrift' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; head of the accusative NP functioning as direct object of 'kaufe'.
Preposition contracted from 'an dem'; governs dative; introduces the locative PP 'am Kiosk'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'am' in dative (location).

sentences.target: Die Zeitschrift liegt auf dem Tisch.

translations.de: Die Zeitschrift liegt auf dem Tisch.
translations.en: The magazine is on the table.
translations.es: La revista está en la mesa.
translations.fr: Le magazine est sur la table.
translations.pt: A revista está em cima da mesa.
translations.vi: Cuốn tạp chí ở trên bàn.
translations.el: Το περιοδικό είναι πάνω στο τραπέζι.
translations.ja: 雑誌はテーブルの上にある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject NP.
Common noun, feminine; head of the subject NP in nominative.
Finite intransitive verb, present tense, 3rd person singular; denotes static location/posture; takes the PP 'auf dem Tisch'.
Preposition; with static location it governs dative case; introduces the PP 'auf dem Tisch'.
Definite article, masculine dative singular; determiner of 'Tisch' under the preposition 'auf'.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition 'auf' in dative; location complement.

sentences.target: Ich suche die Zeitschrift, aber sie ist weg.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈzuːxə diː ˈt͡saɪt͡ʃʁɪft, ˈaːbɐ ziː ɪst vɛk./

translations.de: Ich suche die Zeitschrift, aber sie ist weg.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈzuːxə diː ˈt͡saɪt͡ʃʁɪft, ˈaːbɐ ziː ɪst vɛk./
translations.en: I'm looking for the magazine, but it's gone.
translations.es: Estoy buscando la revista, pero ya no está.
translations.fr: Je cherche le magazine, mais il n'est plus là.
translations.it: Sto cercando la rivista, ma non c'è più.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在找那本杂志，但它不见了。
translations.yue: 我搵緊嗰本雜誌，但佢唔見咗。
translations.ru: Я ищу журнал, но его нет.
translations.pt: Estou procurando a revista, mas ela sumiu.
translations.he: אני מחפש את המגזין, אבל הוא נעלם.
translations.vi: Tôi đang tìm cuốn tạp chí nhưng nó biến mất rồi.
translations.nl: Ik zoek het tijdschrift, maar het is weg.
translations.uk: Я шукаю журнал, але його немає.
translations.hu: Keresem a magazint, de nincs meg.
translations.hi: मैं मैगज़ीन ढूँढ रहा हूँ, लेकिन वह मिल नहीं रही है.
translations.pl: Szukam czasopisma, ale go nie ma.
translations.el: Ψάχνω το περιοδικό, αλλά έχει εξαφανιστεί.
translations.nb: Jeg leter etter bladet, men det er borte.
translations.id: Saya sedang mencari majalah itu, tapi sudah tidak ada.
translations.sv: Jag letar efter tidskriften, men den är borta.
translations.cs: Hledám ten časopis, ale je pryč.
translations.da: Jeg leder efter bladet, men det er væk.
translations.fi: Etsin aikakauslehteä, mutta se on kadonnut.
translations.ja: 雑誌を探しているけど、もうない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the first clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 1st person singular; transitive and selects an accusative object ('die Zeitschrift').
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Zeitschrift' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of 'suche'.
Coordinating conjunction linking two independent clauses and marking contrast.
Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine nominative; subject of the second clause; corefers to 'Zeitschrift'.
Copular auxiliary, present tense, 3rd person singular; links the subject 'sie' to the predicate 'weg'.
Adverb functioning as predicate complement meaning 'away/gone' in the copular construction.

sentences.target: Du bringst die Zeitschrift später mit.

translations.de: Du bringst die Zeitschrift später mit.
translations.yue: 你遲啲帶嗰本雜誌過嚟。
translations.vi: Lát nữa mang tạp chí đến nhé.
translations.ja: あとで雑誌を持ってきてね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present tense, 2nd person singular; transitive and selects an accusative object ('die Zeitschrift'); part of the separable verb 'mitbringen'.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of 'Zeitschrift' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of 'bringst'.
Temporal adverb (comparative form) modifying the verb phrase; indicates time.
Separable verbal particle; together with 'bringst' forms the compound verb 'mitbringen' and is realized clause-finally.
